title: Lightsaber Star Wars, Light Saber Upgraded RGB 15 Colors, USB Rechargeable Lightsaber with Metal Handle, with Sounds Mode Laser Sword Toy for Kids and Adults Cosplay Party Gifts (60CM 1PC)
features: Safe and durable lightsaber: Soft, rounded edges and a lightweight design make our lightsaber perfect for young hands. Our 2 in 1 lightsaber are designed for in-game combat and are made of durable materials to withstand normal in-game battles. Fight confidently in interstellar combat, knowing that your lightsaber is as strong as beautiful. Enjoy the battle.

Realistic light and sound effects: just press a button to illuminate bright and colorful LED lights and FX sounds to bring the galaxy to life. Choose from a variety of (15) colors to match your favorite characters games. Immerse yourself in the planet's universe with authentic sound effects, including legendary hums and crashes, each momentum and collision triggers exciting sound effects for an immersive experience.

2 in 1 Easy to use: Connect two swords to create a double light-up sword! Simple one-touch activation allows children to turn on and off toy swords with ease. The ergonomic design of the handle is comfortable to hold and perfect for hours of fun. Easy installation inspires creative play, connects two swords for a double-edged action and encourages children to recreate their favorite star game scenes or invent their own adventures. Ideal for active games to make children move.

Excellent gift: LED light saber is a popular toy for kids that promotes imaginative play and active outdoor play. Halloween accessories, birthday parties, Christmas gifts, gifts for teenagers, Metroid and Warrior accessories, office stress relief, educational tools, game videos are an integral part of the interactive experience. Pretend you're a fighting star! Live engaging combat!

Package contents: 1 bright swords (with battery), USB cable, connectors, accessories, manual. If you have any questions during use, please contact us. Safe, sturdy and very fun, it is the perfect toy for any young Star Game Play fan. Join the adventure and bring the star game to your home.
